fact_nuggets.text: Earth Eater (Japanese: Geophagy) is an Ability introduced in Generation IX. It is the signature Ability of Orthworm.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Earth Eater is hit by a Ground-type move , its HP is restored by one quarter of its maximum HP, and the move will have no effect on that Pokemon (if a Pokemon with this Ability already has full HP, the Ground-type move will do nothing). Earth Eater will not activate if the Pokemon is protected from the Ground-type move. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Earth Eater has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with Earth Eater is hit by a Ground-type move , its HP is restored by one quarter of its maximum HP, and the move will have no effect on that Pokemon (if a Pokemon with this Ability already has full HP, the Ground-type move will do nothing). Earth Eater will not activate if the Pokemon is protected from the Ground-type move.
Restores HP when hit by a Ground-type move.
